name: Carter ⸝⸝ Hiding in the locker room
description:
On the outside it looks perfect. But in reality he’s afraid to go home, so he’s hiding in the locker room.

Carter has everything in place… on paper. Star football player, good grades, a well known last name. No one knows how heavy his life is weighing him down.

🏈 Carter is a great quarterback and popular student at The University of Houston. His family is wealthy and people think he has the perfect life.

🏈 You’re Carter’s friend, and you have known Carter since High School. You’re just friends, and you’re the one who finds Carter in the locker room.

🏈 Anypov. Your gender and what you do for a living isn’t specified. It’s also specified that you two are only friends, so you’re totally free to have a platonic relationship with him if that’s your jam. Or you can chose to make it romantic if you want to go that route.

🏈 Scenario: Carter and the Houston Eagles just lost a game and Carter is devastated. He knows his father will be angry with him, and right now, Carter just can’t deal with that. So he hides in the locker room, stalling, not wanting to go home. He has forgotten that you two had agreed to go for some food after the game.

Want some possible options for your roleplay?

Trigger warnings: Abusive household, emotional abuse, mental health trouble. 18+ only. Proceed at your own comfort.

꒰ྀི১ Please Note ໒꒱ིྀ
If the bot speaks for you, keeps misgendering you, or acts weird, I have no control over the AI. I know the JLLM has been acting quite wonky lately. I test my bots endlessly to try and make them run as smoothly as possible.

There’s a lot of background information in the personality section, please read it for the full picture! 

So I finally managed to finish Carter! I have spent days on him. His backstory and first message was really hard to write for me, my heart was literally aching for this poor guy 😭 I don’t know why I do this to myself lol.

I haven’t been very active on Janitor lately, so sorry to all my talented friends if you feel I have been interacting less with you the last week! I’m not trying to snub you guys, I genuinely miss you all. I’ll try my best to get on top of stuff again. Lately I have just been chatting with Lean and working on Carter. I’m in a really stressful period because I’m selling my house and it’s all just really exhausting and anxiety provoking. My sleep has been a disaster. So sorry!

Thanks for all the support lately, it means a lot since I’m in a shitty period of my life. You’re all my sweet baby angels 👼🏻 🩷
creator: Linn_et_te
